decision.rationale: The plate violates three of the five cited identity rules and is borderline on the remaining two. Specifically: (1) IR.sean.proportion.head-to-body-1-to-7 is violated: the head is too large, fitting only about 5 times into the total body height (1:5 proportion) instead of the required 1:7 heroic-realistic proportion. (2) IR.sean.proportion.hip-to-floor-4-head-heights is violated: the lower body (~42.5% of height) is shorter than the upper body (~52% of height), and the hip line sits at only ~2.1 head-heights above the floor instead of the required ~4. (3) IR.sean.costume.default-outfit-locked is violated: the stylus prop is missing entirely, the pants are cuffed/rolled at the bottom, and the feet are shown as detailed sneakers with laces and soles instead of simple silhouette-level shapes on the paper base. (4) IR.sean.face.jaw-line-angular-not-rounded is borderline: the mandibular angle at the back of the jaw is honored, but the chin is rounded/pointed in profile rather than squared/flat at the base. (5) IR.sean.style.construction-lines-visible-beneath-final is borderline: some sketchy joint lines are visible at the shoulders and knees, but the required horizontal eye-line and vertical face-midline are completely missing.
